other: Gives {status:AttackUp} to {identity:10215} when she uses her S3.
usage: Starts the battle with 21 {status:GoldenOpportunity} which he loses every turn and whenever a Ring ally (including himself) uses a skill. Once he runs out, he gains a free use of his S3-2. This is his only use of his S3-2 every fight. Assuming no multi-slotting and all Ring allies use a skill every turn, he should trigger this on the 8th turn alone and about 1 turn earlier for each other active Ring ally. His S3-2 is a 3-5 weight attack that applies {status:LivingSpecimenPersonality}. You'll want as much {status:ChargeBodyArt} (both Potency and Count) as possible to maximize the damage on your single use of this.
His S2 gains a free follow up S2-2 against enemies with 5+ negative effects. This applies {status:LivingSpecimenPersonality} along with the S3-2, applying additional debuffs on the target.

Gains {status:ChargeBodyArt} Count when doing damage and killing targets on top of the amount gained from his S2. His S2 and S3 consumes Count for power, damage, and {status:SuperCoin}s. His S3s can also gain atk weight.
Gains additional power, damage, and {keyword:Bleed} application with {status:ChargeBodyArt} Potency due to gaining {status:TibiaPersonality} at 2+ Potency.

1061401.desc:
Before The House of Spiders: The Ring Apprentice Faust uses its Skill 3(except E.G.O Skills), The House of Spiders: The Ring Nursefather Hong Lu uses "My, How We Love the Flesh and the Blood" on Faust (once per turn)

On Hit, if the Attack Skill inflicted a negative effect, heal 4 SP at Attack End (3 times per turn)
1061401.name: A Maestro's Critique

1061404.desc:
Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, gain +(# of The Ring allies on the field x 2) [ChargeBodyArt] Count (max 10)

Skill End: If the Skill dealt HP or Shield damage, gain +5 [ChargeBodyArt] Count
- If target is killed, gain +3 additional [ChargeBodyArt] Count

Gain 1 [ChargeBodyArt] every time this unit consumes 10 cumulative [ChargeBodyArt] Count in this Encounter
- If the above effect brings this unit's [ChargeBodyArt] Potency to 2 or higher, gain [TibiaPersonality]

Base Attack Skills and Clashable Counter Skill count as Skills that gain [Charge] Count
1061404.name: Magnum Opus: Tibia

1061405.desc:
Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, gain 21 [GoldenOpportunity]

When The Ring-faction allied Identities use a Skill, lose 1 [GoldenOpportunity] (once per turn per Identity)

Turn End: If this unit does not have [GoldenOpportunity], replace one of its Base Skills with "Closing Time - Installation Art no. 1: Your Flesh and Bones as the Gallery's Seats" at next Turn Start (once per Encounter; Prioritizes the Skill on the leftmost Slot's bottom row on the Dashboard)
- If the replaced Skill becomes inaccessible due to being replaced by a different Skill, activate the above effect again

Turn End: If this unit was Staggered for the first time in this Encounter, recover from Stagger (excluding forced Stagger)
1061405.name: Transcend the Corpus

1061411.desc:
Before The House of Spiders: The Ring Apprentice Faust uses its Skill 3(except E.G.O Skills), The House of Spiders: The Ring Nursefather Hong Lu uses "My, How We Love the Flesh and the Blood" on Faust (once per turn)

On Hit, if the Attack Skill inflicted a negative effect, heal 4 SP at Attack End (3 times per turn)
- If this unit's SP is at max, gain 1 [SlashDamageUp] next turn when this unit heals SP with this effect (once per turn)
1061411.name: A Maestro's Critique

1061421.desc: Turn End: Inflict 2 [AttackDown] and +1 [Laceration] Count next turn on 1 enemy with the fastest Speed (in Focused Encounters, the Part)
1061421.name: Please, Do Stop Running and Be Seated
